hero.title: Your Vision, Built by Experts
hero.description: Track Progress While We Handle the Rest

ourWorks.title: Our Work
ourWorks.description: Discover how we bring ideas to life through real projects.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.startProjectDescription: Fill out a simple multi-step form to share your idea and business information. No technical jargon required.
howItWorks.planLogoDescription: Receive a customized business plan and instantly create your AI-generated brand logo.
howItWorks.validationCallDescription: One of our consultants will contact you within 24 hours to understand and validate your project.
howItWorks.dashboardAccessDescription: Once your project is approved and paid, access your full dashboard with mockups, timelines, files, and real-time updates.

features.title: Our Services
features.description: Comprehensive digital solutions to propel your business

wizGrow.title: WIZ GROW

contactUs.title: Let's Connect
contactUs.description: Have a question or want to collaborate? We'd love to hear from you. Fill out the form, and we'll get back to you within 24 hours.
contactUs.messagePlaceholder: Tell us about your project, ideas, or questions...
contactUs.errorEmptyFields: Please fill out all fields in the contact form.
contactUs.errorSubmit: Submission Error: An error occurred while sending the message.
contactUs.successMessage: 🛰️ Message Transmitted! Your message has been sent through hyperspace. We'll respond as soon as possible!
contactUs.successDescription: Thank you for contacting us. We'll respond within 24 hours.

ending.title: Build Your Digital Future with BizzWiz AI
ending.description: Join founders and teams using BizzWiz AI to transform their ideas into high-performing websites and products — from plan to launch, quickly and confidently.

footer.description: We bring your digital visions to life with cutting-edge technology and creative excellence. Your success is our mission.
footer.copyright: © 2025 BizzwizAI. All rights reserved. Built with ❤️

instructions.title: How to Get Started
instructions.step1: Please log in to your account with your email and password.
instructions.step2: Register your project details here or create your project details.
instructions.step3: Generate a business plan automatically, which you can download and use to generate a company logo.
instructions.step4: Generate an AI slogan, a slogan can be generated.
instructions.step5: Book an appointment for the selected project.
instructions.step6: Wait for an admin to contact you regarding your appointment and payment.
instructions.step7: Make payment for the booked project after admin confirmation.
instructions.step8: Once the appointment is booked and payment is made, access all user dashboard features.

userName.minLength: Name must be at least 2 characters

userPassword.minLength: Password must be at least 8 characters

errors.validationDescription: Please fix the errors in the form.
errors.submitEmailUsed: This email address is already in use.
errors.submitInvalidPassword: The password does not meet security requirements.
errors.submitPasswordMismatch: The password confirmation does not match.

register.successDescription: Your account has been created successfully. Please check your email to activate your account.

instructions.step1: Log in to your account with your email and password.
instructions.step2: Register your project details here or create your project details.
instructions.step3: Generate a business plan automatically; you can download it and generate a useful company logo for businesses.
instructions.step4: Generate an AI slogan; a slogan can be generated.
instructions.step5: Book an appointment for the selected project.
instructions.step6: Wait for an admin to contact you regarding your appointment and payment.
instructions.step7: Make the payment for the booked project after admin confirmation.
instructions.step8: Once the appointment is booked and payment is made, access all features of the user dashboard.

stepWelcome.title: Welcome to the BizzWiz AI Universe
stepWelcome.description: You’re not just filling out a form. You’re co-creating your digital project.
stepWelcome.imageAlt: Futuristic 3D BizzWiz AI bee mascot with purple and neon blue accents, premium cyberpunk style

stepDescribeProject.chatMessage: Describe your Project. The clearer, the better for our AI!

projectDescription.label: Your Idea, Your Words:
projectDescription.placeholder: E.g., A platform to connect independent musicians with local small concert venues, with a matching system based on music style and availability...

error.title: Validation Error
error.description: Please fill in both the project name and description.

stepUserMotivation.chatMessage: Tell us what drives you for this project.

userMotivation.label: What is your main motivation behind this project?
userMotivation.placeholder: E.g., Solving an urgent problem, exploring a passion, innovating in my field...

userInspiration.label: Are there any projects, ideas, or people inspiring you for this? (Optional)
userInspiration.placeholder: E.g., I admire the approach of [Company X], or I’m inspired by [Person Y]...

userConcerns.label: Do you have any specific fears or concerns about this project? (Optional)
userConcerns.placeholder: E.g., Fear of lacking technical skills, budget concerns, difficulty reaching the target...

stepSolutionType.chatMessage: Solution Type. What form will your project take?

stepAudience.chatMessage: Target Audience. Who is your solution primarily aimed at?

stepFeatures.chatMessage: Key Features. What are the essential capabilities of your project?

stepVisualStyle.chatMessage: Preferred Visual Style. What atmosphere do you want for your project?

fontSelection.chatMessage: Typography. Choose a font for your logo.

colorPaletteSelection.chatMessage: Color Palette. Discover and create perfect color palettes for your logo.
colorPaletteSelection.saveAlert: Color palette CSS copied to clipboard!

stepTiming.chatMessage: Timing / Urgency. What is your ideal deadline for this project?

stepBudget.chatMessage: Estimated Budget. What is your budget range for this project?

stepMission.chatMessage: Your Mission in One Sentence. Summarize the essence of your project.
stepMission.ariaLabelPart1: Enter the target audience to help
stepMission.ariaLabelPart2: Enter the problem to solve or goal to achieve
stepMission.exampleText: Ex: I want to help creative freelancers to find more clients through an intelligent matchmaking platform.

multiStepForm.loadingDescription: Processing your project details and generating your business plan...
multiStepForm.incompleteForm: Please fill in all required fields before submitting.
multiStepForm.notLoggedIn: User not logged in. Please log in and try again.
multiStepForm.networkError: Network error, please check your internet connection.

multiStepFormView.successDescription: Your project has been successfully submitted. We are excited to bring it to life!

businessComponent.title: Your Business Plan
businessComponent.subtitle: Discover your personalized business plan and start your entrepreneurial journey
businessComponent.errorUserId: User ID or Form Data ID not found
businessComponent.planAlreadyExists: Business plan already exists, no new generation needed.
businessComponent.downloadAriaLabel: Download the business plan as a PDF
businessComponent.validationDescription: Mark this business plan as validated to proceed to the next step
businessComponent.validationDialogDescription: Are you sure you want to validate this business plan?
businessComponent.validationNoReturn: Once confirmed, there will be no going back.
businessComponent.validationNextStep: This action will mark your business plan as validated and allow you to proceed to the next step.
businessComponent.aiModificationDescription: Request modifications via AI ({{remaining}} uses remaining)
businessComponent.aiModificationPlaceholder: Ex: Add more details to the marketing strategy, modify the financial section...

logoComponent.title: Logo Generation
logoComponent.subtitle: Chat with the AI and get a logo for your project
logoComponent.chatSubtitle: Describe your vision and get a logo
logoComponent.welcomeMessage: Hello! I am your AI assistant to create the perfect logo. Can you describe your vision for your company's logo? (Example: 'A modern logo for a food company with vibrant colors')
logoComponent.existingLogoMessage: A logo has already been generated for this project.
logoComponent.successMessage: Here is a logo suggestion based on your description!
logoComponent.errorRetry: Please try again later if the model is overloaded.
logoComponent.backAriaLabel: Go back to the previous step
logoComponent.singleLogoMessage: Only one logo can be generated per project.
logoComponent.validationDescription: Mark this logo as validated to proceed to the next step
logoComponent.validationDialogDescription: Are you sure you want to validate this logo?
logoComponent.validationNoReturn: Once confirmed, there will be no going back.
logoComponent.aiModificationDescription: Request modifications via AI ({{remaining}} uses remaining)
logoComponent.modificationPlaceholder: Describe the desired modification (ex: colors, style, icon)
logoComponent.modificationSuccess: Modification applied. Here is a new logo proposal.

sloganComponent.title: Slogan Generation
sloganComponent.subtitle: Describe your idea and get up to 5 impactful slogans
sloganComponent.promptSubtitle: A brief description to generate slogans
sloganComponent.inputPlaceholder: Ex: An energetic, modern slogan for a platform that connects developers and clients
sloganComponent.validationDescription: Mark these slogans as validated to proceed to the next step
sloganComponent.validationDialogDescription: Are you sure you want to validate these slogans?
sloganComponent.validationNoReturn: Once confirmed, there will be no going back.
sloganComponent.aiPanelDescription: Request modifications via AI ({{remaining}} uses remaining)
sloganComponent.aiModalHelp: Describe the desired changes (e.g., bolder tone, shorter, B2B oriented)
sloganComponent.aiModalPlaceholder: Ex: Make the slogan more dynamic and punchy
sloganComponent.manualModalHelp: Freely edit the list (one line = one slogan)
sloganComponent.welcomeMessage: Hello! I am your AI assistant for creating impactful slogans. Describe your slogan idea or your business to get started!
sloganComponent.existingListIntro: Here are the slogans already generated for your project:
sloganComponent.updatedMessage: Slogans updated according to your request.

instructions.title: Password Reset Instructions
instructions.step1: Enter the email address associated with your account.
instructions.step2: Create a strong password with at least 8 characters including uppercase, lowercase, numbers, and special characters.
instructions.step3: Confirm your new password by typing it again in the confirmation field.
instructions.step4: Click 'Update Password' to save your new password.
instructions.step5: You will be redirected to the login page where you can sign in with your new credentials.
